title: feat(terminal): move HistoryPane into each split with per-cliToolId message filtering (#728 follow-up)

issue_review.stages: 1-4 (opus); Stage 5-8 Codex delegation skipped per user policy
issue_review.key_correction: state.messages is server-filtered to active CLI tab → per-split independent fetch required (useSplitMessages)

acceptance.criteria_met: 13/14 met, 1 partial (A=Claude/B=Claude AC unreachable due to useTerminalSplits same-CLI invariant)

fixes: FINDING-1: per-split unique data-testid + non-dangling aria-controls (splitHistorySlotId/collapseButtonTestId helpers)
FINDING-3: gated parent fetchMessages() poll to mobile-only (state.messages now PC-unused; removes double-fetch)

uat.reason: PC-only UI fix fully verified by unit+build+tsc/lint; live multi-CLI session hard to reproduce headlessly; user approved skip (feedback_skip_uat_ui_fix)

deferred_follow_ups: A=Claude/B=Claude AC is unreachable because useTerminalSplits (S1-002, #728) forbids same CLI in two splits; the per-split code handles it correctly (namespace keyed by splitIndex), but no user path exercises it. Consider clarifying/removing that AC.
Per-split History visible/width are currently shared via single useHistoryPaneState (documented MVP); per-split independent visible/width is a separate Issue.
